Engineering tools worth testing on Hellscream
  • Nitro Boosts: emergency movement; test failure behavior before relying on it.
  • Reticulated Armor Webbing: strong glove armor for Engineers.
  • Mind Amplification Dish: 45 stamina head tinker; verify whether it replaces or stacks with the normal head enchant.
  • Saronite Bombs: optional pack or add damage when raid rules and encounter safety allow it.
